race.comment: MAALIS SONG (2) disappointed two back but bounced back to form over this trip at Ascot last time out, missing by 0.8L. The wide draw is a query, but he's building nicely this campaign and if he gets some luck in running, he can feature on his last start figure. ANTIQUE QUEEN (9) is some query on her latest trial, but Pike was on board there and sticks with her for her return. She was sound on resumption off a long break in this company fresh and she tends to get back in her races anyway, so the wide draw isn't a big issue. Best form is good enough and she can return a winner. KARNUP QUEEN (16) won well fresh before a 0.3L defeat in this company last time out at Ascot. Third-up now and she remains down in the weights. Parnham hops on board now and she can feature in the finish. THINK PINK DAZE (15) can't be left out of calculations on her recent form. SNOW GOD (3) is better than he showed last time out and can bounce back.
